title: Korak 10

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: You should log the message "The Math.ceil() method rounds the value up to the nearest whole integer."

description:
Sada je vreme da pregledamo kako radi metoda Math.ceil().

Počnite tako što ćete logovati string "The Math.ceil() method rounds the value up to the nearest whole integer." na konzolu.
